'''hagate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:learily|learily]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| h-g-v
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:learily|learily]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| hagate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:hagate|hagate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:hagatesher|hagatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:hagatesherĂ«m|hagatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:hagatero|hagatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:hagateshĂ«|hagateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:hagateshĂ«m|hagateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokihagatero|gokihagatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokihagateshĂ«|gokihagateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokihagateshĂ«m|gokihagateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gohagankerom|gohagankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gohagankeshĂ«|gohagankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gohagankeshĂ«m|gohagankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gohagankeya|gohagankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:hagaterom|hagaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:hagatemu|hagatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:hagateya|hagateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokihagaterom|gokihagaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokihagatemu|gokihagatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokihagateya|gokihagateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:hagagate|hagagate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:hagagatesher|hagagatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:hagagatesherĂ«m|hagagatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:hagagatero|hagagatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:hagagateshĂ«|hagagateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:hagagateshĂ«m|hagagateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokihagagatero|gokihagagatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokihagagateshĂ«|gokihagagateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokihagagateshĂ«m|gokihagagateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gohagagankerom|gohagagankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gohagagankeshĂ«|gohagagankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gohagagankeshĂ«m|gohagagankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gohagagankeya|gohagagankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:hagagaterom|hagagaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:hagagatemu|hagagatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:hagagateya|hagagateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokihagagaterom|gokihagagaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokihagagatemu|gokihagagatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokihagagateya|gokihagagateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:hĂŠgĂŠte|hĂŠgĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:hĂŠgĂŠtesher|hĂŠgĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:hĂŠgĂŠtesherĂ«m|hĂŠgĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:hĂŠgĂŠtero|hĂŠgĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:hĂŠgĂŠteshĂ«|hĂŠgĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:hĂŠgĂŠteshĂ«m|hĂŠgĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokihĂŠgĂŠtero|gokihĂŠgĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokihĂŠgĂŠteshĂ«|gokihĂŠgĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokihĂŠgĂŠteshĂ«m|gokihĂŠgĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gohĂŠgĂŠnkerom|gohĂŠgĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gohĂŠgĂŠnkeshĂ«|gohĂŠgĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gohĂŠgĂŠnkeshĂ«m|gohĂŠgĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gohĂŠgĂŠnkeya|gohĂŠgĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:hĂŠgĂŠterom|hĂŠgĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:hĂŠgĂŠtemu|hĂŠgĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:hĂŠgĂŠteya|hĂŠgĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokihĂŠgĂŠterom|gokihĂŠgĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokihĂŠgĂŠtemu|gokihĂŠgĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokihĂŠgĂŠteya|gokihĂŠgĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:hafgafte|hafgafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:hafgaftesher|hafgaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:hafgaftesherĂ«m|hafgaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:hafgaftero|hafgaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:hafgafteshĂ«|hafgafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:hafgafteshĂ«m|hafgafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokihafgaftero|gokihafgaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokihafgafteshĂ«|gokihafgafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokihafgafteshĂ«m|gokihafgafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gohafgafnkerom|gohafgafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gohafgafnkeshĂ«|gohafgafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gohafgafnkeshĂ«m|gohafgafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gohafgafnkeya|gohafgafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:hafgafterom|hafgafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:hafgaftemu|hafgaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:hafgafteya|hafgafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokihafgafterom|gokihafgafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokihafgaftemu|gokihafgaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokihafgafteya|gokihafgafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
